contractName: PIT-safe Feature Availability Registry Contract v1
disclaimer: Paper design. Not investment advice. Not a performance claim.
purpose: Define a machine-readable contract for all feature sources in the prediction system, describing their PIT-safety status, availability gates, scoring participation, and known limitations.

entrySchema.gateField: string | null — DB field used for PIT filtering
entrySchema.pitDateField: string | null — canonical date comparison field for asOfDate gate
entrySchema.pitRule: string — human-readable rule describing the PIT gate
entrySchema.coverageWindow: string — time range of available data
entrySchema.freshnessRule: string — how to determine if source data is stale
entrySchema.entersAlphaScore: boolean — true if source contributes to alphaScore calculation
entrySchema.signalFusionWeightStock: number | null — weight in SignalFusionEngine for stock type
entrySchema.signalFusionWeightETF: number | null — weight in SignalFusionEngine for ETF type
entrySchema.entersRendererOnly: boolean — true if source appears in renderer/reason context but not alphaScore
entrySchema.requiredForCorpusExpansion: boolean — whether source availability gates corpus expansion
entrySchema.allowedWhenMissing: string — how the system behaves when source is absent
entrySchema.fallbackBehavior: string — fallback logic when source is unavailable
entrySchema.forbiddenBehavior: string — what must NOT happen when source is missing or not PIT-safe
entrySchema.evidenceArtifacts: string[] — reference artifacts for this entry's status

registryRules: R1: Any source with entersAlphaScore=true MUST have a verified PIT gate (gateField != null and pitRule documented).
R2: Any source with sourceStatus=HIGH_RISK_SOURCE_ABSENT MUST have entersAlphaScore=false.
R3: Any source with sourceStatus=NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_SCORING MUST have entersAlphaScore=false.
R4: NewsEvent and FinancialReport must NOT enter alphaScore until their sourceStatus transitions to AVAILABLE_PIT_SAFE.
R5: MonthlyRevenue remains source-gated (REPAIRED_BUT_SOURCE_GATED) until P26F4 import is completed.
R6: Registry is paper design only — no production scoring path may import this registry file.
R7: A source with entersRendererOnly=true still requires PIT safety if its rendered text could expose future data.
R8: forbiddenBehavior must be explicitly documented for every source.
R9: ingestedAt, createdAt, updatedAt, periodEndDate, fiscalQuarter are NEVER valid PIT gate fields.
R10: P26F4 import approval token must remain required; registry does not grant import permission.
